description: AI-powered case text analysis using GPT-4. Extracts issue type, urgency, products, symptoms, and customer sentiment. Part of the Carrier Case Triage Agent Swarm.
use_case: MVP Use Case 1 - Customer Service Case Triage

demo_scenarios.name: Full Analysis
demo_scenarios.description: Complete AI analysis of case text

request.case_text: Our rooftop unit 50XC (serial 2419G12345) stopped cooling this morning. Display shows E47 error. Temperature in building is 82F and climbing. We have a corporate event tonight - URGENT!

demo_scenarios.name: Classify Issue Type
demo_scenarios.description: Determine the type of issue from case text

request.case_text: Need to schedule quarterly maintenance for our chiller. Due next month.
AC making loud noise. Building is still cool but concerned about failure.

demo_scenarios.name: Extract Product References
demo_scenarios.description: Find Carrier product models and serials in text

request.case_text: We have three 30RB chillers (30RB-080, 30RB-100, and 30RB-120) that need service. Also have an i-Vu control system.

ai_model.purpose: Structured data extraction with high accuracy
